mapper.insert: INSERT INTO bike_station (number, address, banking, bike_stands, name, position_lat, position_lng) VALUES (#{number}, #{address}, #{banking}, #{bikeStands}, #{name}, #{positionLat}, #{positionLng})

INSERT INTO bike_station (number, address, banking, bike_stands, name, position_lat, position_lng) VALUES
(#{item.number}, #{item.address}, #{item.banking}, #{item.bikeStands}, #{item.name}, #{item.positionLat}, #{item.positionLng})
mapper.select: SELECT number, address, banking, bike_stands, name, position_lat, position_lng FROM bike_station
